title: Photos App Overview
drDigitalIntro: The Photos app is where all your photos live — from your Mac's camera, your iPhone, or photos you've downloaded. Open Photos and you'll see all your pictures organized chronologically. You can create albums, mark favorites, search by date or keywords, view people in your photos, and see where photos were taken on a map.

playgroundTask.question: The Photos app organizes your pictures by:

drDigitalSuccess: Photos is smart — it uses date, faces, locations, and your albums to organize everything automatically.
drDigitalHint: Photos does a lot of organizing for you — it uses information embedded in each photo file.
